ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly identifies Son Goten. The art shows a young dark-haired fighter in a dark gi with ki energy gathering — consistent with Goten's canonical appearance as a child fighter at the 25th World Martial Arts Tournament Junior Division. Confirmed via Dragon Ball Wiki and official Dragon Ball site.

trivia_bullets.text: Son Goten entered the Junior Division of the 25th World Martial Arts Tournament at age 7, defeating his first opponent with a single punch before facing his best friend Trunks in the final. Goten achieved Super Saiyan transformation earlier than any character in the series at that point. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Goten; Official Dragon Ball site character showcase no. 61]

The 'Scuffle Time' title captures the Junior Division's tone — Goten and Trunks treat their matches as rough-and-tumble play rather than serious competition, a deliberate tonal contrast to the Babidi threat emerging in the adult bracket simultaneously. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Trunks vs. Goten Part 2]

In the Junior Division final, Goten transformed into a Super Saiyan mid-match to break free from Trunks' hold — at age 7, both boys were already casually achieving transformations that adult fighters trained years to reach. Community sentiment on r/dragonball treats the Junior Division as the series' most charming display of the next generation's absurd power ceiling. [WebSearch: Son Goten Junior Division tournament]
